name: Kevin Bai
summary: Analytics professional with 5+ years across adtech and insurance, building BI, experimentation, machine learning, and data systems that improve revenue, reduce fraud, and speed up decision-making.
proofPoints: Increased year-over-year CTV revenue by more than 150% by supporting media encoding and playback analytics for partners including Disney, NBCU, and Paramount.
Reduced fraudulent ad placements to under 3% and cut manual investigations by 70% by building dbt models and executive dashboards for fraud monitoring.
Improved revenue-to-impression ratio by 25% by designing A/B tests, defining metrics, and analyzing product performance in adtech workflows.
Built AWS data pipelines with Glue, Lambda, and S3 that cut processing time by 50% and saved analysts roughly 20 hours per week.
Developed Python and XGBoost retention models and dashboards that supported a 40% Q4-to-Q1 lift in commercial client retention.
